text_en: You know, after a long day at work, I really look forward to my evening wind-down routine. First off, I usually kick off my shoes the moment I get inside. Then, I make myself a nice cup of herbal tea – camomile is my go-to. I don't really watch much TV, but I love to curl up on the sofa with a good book. Sometimes, if I'm feeling a bit restless, I'll put on some soft jazz music. It really helps me clear my head. Before bed, I always try to do a quick five-minute meditation. It just helps me switch off and get ready for a good night's sleep. It's nothing fancy, but it works wonders for me.
